traits.name: Stout
traits.description: Start with +2 HP. Roll hit points per level with advantage.

traits.name: Farsight
traits.description: You get a +1 bonus to attack rolls with ranged weapons or a +1 bonus to spellcasting checks.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You can't be surprised.

traits.name: Mighty
traits.description: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with melee weapons.

traits.name: Stealthy
traits.description: Once per day, you can become invisible for 3 rounds.

name: Human

traits.name: Ambitious
traits.description: You gain one additional talent roll at 1st level.

languages: one additional common language (player's choice, pg. 32)

name: Gnome, Deep

traits.name: Gemsense
traits.description: You can detect the presence or absence (but not location) of precious gems within near. Penetrates up to 1' of material. Lead of any thickness blocks this sense.

source: Letters from the Dark Vol. III: Tales of the Fey

name: Gnome, Forest

traits.name: Critterspeech
traits.description: You can speak to and understand natural animals that are cat-sized or smaller.

source: Letters from the Dark Vol. III: Tales of the Fey

name: Human

traits.name: Adaptable
traits.description: You gain one additional skill of your choice at character creation.

languages: one additional language of your choice

traits.name: Ancient Blood
traits.description: You have nightvision to near range. You make INT checks to recall lore with advantage.

traits.name: Tunnel-Born
traits.description: You have nightvision to near range. You have +1 to saves vs. magic effects.

traits.name: Underground Wayfinder
traits.description: You always know which direction is north while underground. You have +1 to stealth checks.

traits.name: Deep Sight
traits.description: You have nightvision to far range. While at half HP or below, you gain one additional melee attack per round.

traits.name: Shadow Delver
traits.description: You have nightvision to near range. You gain +1 to initiative rolls.

traits.name: Lurker
traits.description: You have nightvision to near range. You can attempt to hide even when only lightly obscured.

traits.name: Cobbler's Gift
traits.description: Once per day, you can transform into any small animal (cat-sized or smaller) for up to 1 hour. You retain your INT but otherwise use the animal's stats.

traits.name: Iron Will
traits.description: You have +2 to saves vs. mind-affecting effects. You cannot be surprised while conscious.

traits.name: Blood Scent
traits.description: You can track any creature that has bled within the last hour without a roll. You have +1 to attack rolls when below half HP.

traits.name: Terrifying
traits.description: Creatures of 1 HD or fewer that can see you must pass a DC 12 WIS check at the start of combat or be frightened for 1 round. Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 damage.

traits.name: Savage Combatant
traits.description: Your claws and bite are natural weapons that deal 1d6 damage. Once per combat, you may make one additional melee attack as a free action.

name: Changeling

traits.name: Shapeshifter
traits.description: You can alter your appearance to look like any humanoid you have seen (takes 15 seconds). This is purely cosmetic. You have +2 to saves vs. mind control and illusion effects.

languages: one additional language of your choice

traits.name: Pack Hunter
traits.description: When an ally is adjacent to your target, you gain +1 to attack rolls against it. You can track by scent with advantage.

traits.name: Street Cunning
traits.description: You have +1 to DEX-based checks. You can follow a scent trail up to a mile old without a roll.
